news.headline: WH Sr. Adviser Hassett: revenue from China tariffs $500 bln to $1 trln over 10 years.
OCI Energy and Arava Power partner for 260 MWac solar project in Texas; 2nd agreement.
news.summary: In San Antonio on February 20, 2025, OCI Energy, a prominent clean energy company from Texas, and Arava Power, a solar energy innovator from Israel, have established a partnership for the second time to launch Project SunRoper. This joint venture aims to develop a solar project with a capacity of 260 MWac.

news.headline: MFS Trade School offers industry-leading kitchen exhaust hood cleaning certification program to improve kitchen safety standards.
news.summary: In Sanford, Florida, businesses in the food service and hospitality industries are facing increased pressure to maintain clean kitchen environments due to new laws and strict fire safety regulations. This has led to the launch of a Commercial Kitchen Exhaust Hood Cleaning Certification Program by MFSTradeSchool.com, a leading provider in this field. The program aims to provide thorough training in ensuring spotless kitchen exhaust hood cleaning, in line with industry standards. This initiative comes at a crucial time as businesses strive to comply with changing regulations.

news.headline: Martin Marietta declares $0.79 quarterly dividend per share for common stock, payable on March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on February 20, 2025, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) disclosed that its Board of Directors authorized a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.79 per share on the Company’s common stock. The dividend is set to be distributed on March 31, 2025, to shareholders listed as of the closing of business on March 3, 2025.

news.headline: Axon stock continues to slide post-analyst downgrade due to partnership issues, defended by Morgan Stanley.
news.summary: Following an analyst downgrade on Wednesday, Axon's stock continued to decline due to concerns over a strained relationship with a former partner now considered a competitor. The company's shares have seen a persistent slide, despite efforts by Morgan Stanley to defend the stock. This development has raised worries amongst investors and analysts about the future performance of Axon.

news.headline: Cruise stocks plummeted due to crackdown threat on tax avoidance, Stifel believes sell-off was overdone, undercutting support levels.
news.summary: After a U.S. official accused the cruise industry of dodging U.S. taxes, several cruise stocks fell below crucial support levels in the market. The stocks experienced a sell-off following the threat of a crackdown. However, Stifel believes that the reaction to Trump's warning was exaggerated and not reflective of the actual situation. The specific numbers involved in the stock movement weren't provided in the rephrased text.

news.headline: WH Sr. Adviser Hassett: Layoffs at IRS could increase from 3500.
SDRE tackles San Diego housing crisis, creating attainable homes as new development struggles to keep up.
news.summary: In San Diego, amid a housing crisis, SDRE, a local homebuilding group ingrained in the community, is committed to providing affordable housing. Despite the pressing need, new housing development in San Diego hasn't met demand.

news.headline: Erik Waldin named Chairman of Board at Anthony & Sylvan Pools, a leading US pool builder and service provider.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 20, 2025, based in Warminster, Pennsylvania, Anthony & Sylvan Pools, a leading company in residential pool and spa construction, renovations, and services in the US, revealed the appointment of Erik Waldin as the new Chairman of the Board of Directors. Waldin, taking on this role, comes with a wealth of experience and expertise to lead the company to further success.

Mexico's Foreign Min. Ebrard: I have had constructive dialogue with top US trade officials.
Smart Mobile Labs, a Boldyn Networks company, secures major 5G campus network deal with Deutsche Bahn, largest railway company.
news.summary: MUNICH - On February 20, 2025, Smart Mobile Labs (SML), a subsidiary of Boldyn Networks (Boldyn), announced a significant partnership with Deutsche Bahn AG, the world's largest railway company. This collaboration will focus on providing cutting-edge private 5G network solutions. The agreement, part of a framework deal, marks a pivotal move for the companies involved.

COSPRO debuts new electric grinder sets at The Inspired Home Show in Chicago. Launching QIC-101SPL, QIC-201SPL, QIC-201SPGH.
news.summary: Chicago-based company COSPRO revealed the introduction of three new kitchen tools, namely QIC-101SPL, QIC-201SPL, and QIC-201SPGH, during The Inspired Home Show. The products will be exhibited at Booth #S3660 in the South Building. COSPRO is known for its premium-quality and groundbreaking kitchenware innovations.

news.headline: Shell Shock Technologies hosts inaugural Legends and Heroes Shootout for veterans and first responders, raising funds for K9 Heroes 4 Heroes and NRA. Event to take place on April 27-28, 2025.
news.summary: A fundraising event will be held on April 27-28, 2025, in EUBANK, Ky., where MLB stars, celebrities, and veterans will come together for two days of shooting and golfing. The event aims to raise funds for K9 Heroes 4 Heroes and the NRA. Shell Shock Technologies, LLC. (SST), a prominent name in the ammunition industry, will be part of this initiative.

news.headline: Boeing names Jeff Shockey as executive VP of Govt Ops, Global Public Policy & Corp Strategy starting Feb. 24.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on February 20, 2025, Boeing revealed that Jeff Shockey has been appointed as the new executive vice president of Government Operations, Global Public Policy, and Corporate Strategy, starting from February 24. Shockey will be in charge of managing Boeing's worldwide public policy initiatives.

news.headline: WH National Security Adviser Waltz: Europe needs to step up for their own defense as a NATO partner.
Dow Jones futures climb as market approaches highs, Tesla speeds up new Model Y deliveries. Amazon, Broadcom near buy points.
news.summary: Stock futures are on the rise as the market approaches new highs. Tesla is accelerating the delivery of its latest Model Y. Shares of Amazon and Broadcom are close to potential buy points, indicating a positive market outlook. Dow Jones Futures are increasing, hinting at continued bullish sentiment.

news.headline: Tech firms delay going public due to Trump administration's tariff announcements, causing market volatility.
news.summary: A number of technology firms are postponing or withdrawing their plans to go public due to the market instability and ambiguity stemming from the tariff declarations and other modifications made by the Trump administration.

news.headline: Prime Drink Group Corp. (CSE: PRME) revamped its subsidiary, Triani Canada Inc., for long-term viability and plant profitability.
news.summary: In Montreal on February 18, 2025, Prime Drink Group Corp. (CSE: PRME) revealed a strategic reorganization of its subsidiary, Triani Canada Inc. (known as Prime Bottling). The main aim of this restructuring is to implement recommendations from an impartial financial review into existing operations, in order to evaluate sustainability and enhance organizational frameworks to boost profitability of bottling plant functions and proprietary brand licenses.

news.headline: Dow Jones down, S&P 500 close to all-time high; Nvidia near buy point. Market overview by Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline while the S&P 500 index was on track to potentially reach a new all-time high. Nvidia's stock saw a significant increase close to a potential new buy point. This trend signifies a mixed day in the stock market, with the Dow Jones falling but the S&P 500 showing promise of breaking records. Nvidia's rally near a buy point also caught the attention of investors. This information was originally reported on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: President aims to raise taxes on private equity profits to fund campaign promises like eliminating taxes on overtime, tipped income and Social Security benefits.
news.summary: The proposed increase in taxes on private equity profits is aimed at funding various populist initiatives put forth by the president. These initiatives include plans to eliminate taxes on overtime pay, tipped income, and Social Security benefits. The move is part of efforts to fulfill campaign promises and address key issues affecting the population.

news.headline: Trump's tariffs pose threat to auto industry in North America, industry insiders warn. Production at risk of halting.
news.summary: Analysts and industry insiders are cautioning that President Donald Trump's tariffs could potentially halt automotive production in North America.

news.headline: ReShape Lifesciences announces upsized $6.0 million public offering, pricing 2,575,107 units at $2.33/unit.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, on Feb. 15, 2025, ReShape Lifesciences® (Nasdaq: RSLS) disclosed the pricing details of its public offering. The company finalized the offering of 2,575,107 units at a rate of $2.33 per unit. Each unit comprises one common share (or a pre-funded warrant for one common share) and one warrant for an additional common share. This move by ReShape, known for its focus on weight loss and metabolic health solutions led by physicians, marks a significant development in its investment strategy.

news.headline: H&E Equipment favors Herc Holdings' $104.89 per share offer over United Rentals' $92.00, expires February 24, 2025. HRI in NYSE.
news.summary: H& E Equipment Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: HEES) and Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI) are experiencing movement in their shares today. Herc Holdings has proposed to acquire all outstanding shares of H& E Equipment Services at $104.89 per share. This offer is calculated based on Herc's 10-day VWAP and a closing price of $200.74 per share on February 14, 2025. The acquisition offer includes $78.75 in cash per share, with tax withholding adjustments, and a fixed exchange ratio of 0.1287 shares of Herc common stock. The offer, backed by a fully negotiated merger agreement and financing commitments, will expire at 12:01 p.m. Eastern Time on February 24, 2025. H& E's Board has deemed Herc's cash and stock merger offer as superior to the $92.00 per share cash sale proposed by United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE: URI). H& E has informed United Rentals of their decision.

news.headline: GCL and RF Acquisition Corp. merge, GCL begins trading on Nasdaq as "GCL," with a planned bell ringing to mark listing.
news.summary: GCL & RF Acquisition Corp. has successfully finalized their business merge, resulting in the commencement of GCL trading on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol “GCL”. The company has also announced a special bell ringing event to celebrate its listing on the exchange.

news.headline: Alkaline Water Co. (WTER) applies for uplisting to OTCQB market tier, known for its purified alkaline water.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona on February 18, 2025, a company recognized for its purified alkaline water with added Himalayan rock salt, The Alkaline Water Company, Inc. (OTC: WTER), revealed its submission for an uplisting to the OTCQB market tier.

news.headline: ECB faces danger of staff conflict with plan to renovate Works Council, risking internal discord.
US and Russia begin peace talks on Ukraine, boosting stock markets. US indices remain stable. Oil futures steady.
news.summary: In the midday trading session on Tuesday, major U.S. stock indices remained relatively flat as investors kept a close eye on recent geopolitical events. A meeting took place in Saudi Arabia between U.S. and Russian officials to initiate peace talks regarding the conflict in Ukraine, their first high-level discussion on the matter since Russia’s invasion in 2022. The talks aimed at building trust and potentially paving the way for a future meeting between President Donald Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin, with the absence of Ukrainian and European representatives in the initial discussions. WTI crude oil futures showed stability amidst hopes of decreased geopolitical tensions due to diplomatic talks between the U.S. and Russia. Furthermore, the yield on the 10-year US Treasury note saw a 0.04% increase, surpassing the 4.5% threshold amid investor activities.

news.headline: Celanese Corp beats Q4 EPS estimate of $1.20 with $1.45 reported. Q4 sales at $2.37 billion in line with estimates. Guidance for 2025 EPS is 25-50 cents, below analysts' $1.63 estimate. JPMorgan lowers price forecast from $92.
news.summary: Shares of Celanese Corporation (NYSE: CE) took a hit on Thursday after a number of analysts reduced their price targets, responding to the fourth-quarter earnings report released earlier in the week. During this period, Celanese posted adjusted earnings per share of $1.45, surpassing the projected $1.20. Sales for the quarter stood at $2.37 billion, in line with analyst predictions. Looking ahead, for the first quarter of 2025, the company anticipates earnings per share ranging from 25 cents to 50 cents, a significant drop from the anticipated $1.63. Additionally, Celanese foresees that second-quarter earnings per share in 2025 will increase by about $1 compared to the first quarter. JPMorgan analyst Jeffrey J. Zekauskas adjusted the price target from $92...

news.headline: Unlock today's Hamster Kombat rewards with the daily combo and cipher code for Thursday, February 20.
news.summary: Want to access the daily combo and cipher code for Thursday, February 20? Find the key to unlocking rewards in Hamster Kombat: GameDev Heroes.

news.headline: Duke Robotics forms Greek subsidiary to expand civilian market growth in Greece; Greece invests over $32 billion in energy-related projects.
news.summary: Duke Robotics has established Duke Robotics Hellas as its inaugural European branch, with a primary focus on promoting the adoption of its IC Drone technology in the market. Greece is channeling substantial investments into infrastructure, with a notable sum of more than $32 billion in EU funding earmarked for energy-related initiatives. Duke Robotics Hellas is strategically positioned to leverage these developments and drive the expansion of Duke Robotics' innovative drone solutions in the region.

news.headline: Kiva AI renamed Perle, offering training data solutions for AI models. Supports in defining project requirements, data tagging, RLHF, data cleaning, etc.
news.summary: San Francisco based company KIVA AI recently rebranded to Perle, with a focus on providing modular training data solutions that incorporate human expertise into AI models. This rebrand aims to simplify the process of training and optimizing advanced multi-modal AI models for customers. Perle offers a range of services including defining project needs, RLHF, expert human data tagging, data enrichment, cleaning, and protection from adversarial attacks. The company's goal is to offer actionable insights and intelligence to businesses utilizing AI technology.

news.headline: Blue Ocean Global Technology acquires Capital Expert Services to expand economic analysis and M&A valuation capabilities.
news.summary: Blue Ocean Global Technology, a renowned strategic consulting firm based in New York, has teamed up with Capital Expert Services, LLC to enhance their economic analysis and merger and acquisition valuation services. The collaboration aims to leverage the combined expertise of both companies for improved offerings in this domain. This partnership, initiated on February 20, 2025, signifies a significant development in the industry.

news.headline: NetEase Q4 revenue declined to $3.66 billion, missing estimate. Gaming revenue grew 1.5%. Stock fell after report.
news.summary: NetEase, Inc (NASDAQ:NTES) recently reported a 1.4% year-on-year revenue decline for its fiscal fourth-quarter, totaling $3.66 billion (26.7 billion Chinese yuan). This figure fell short of the analyst consensus estimate of $3.74 billion. However, the Chinese gaming company's adjusted Earnings Per ADS (EPADS) surpassed expectations, coming in at $2.07 compared to the estimated $1.77. Despite this, the stock saw a decline following the report. Within their segments, Games and related value-added services revenues saw a 1.5% increase year over year, reaching $2.9 billion. The gross margin for this segment dropped by 280 basis points to 67.5%. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Roche introduces breakthrough sequencing by expansion technology for high-throughput sequencing - new class of NGS.
news.summary: On February 20th, 2025, Roche introduced its innovative sequencing by expansion (SBX) technology in Basel. This new approach, utilizing SBX chemistry and a novel sensor module, marks a significant advancement in next-generation sequencing. The technology provides rapid and high-throughput sequencing capabilities, offering flexibility and scalability for various applications. Roche is listed on the SIX and OTCQX stock exchanges under ticker symbols RO, ROG, and RHHBY.

news.headline: LexisNexis helps US life insurers improve underwriting process with digital health data insights at scale.
news.summary: LexisNexis® Risk Solutions highlighted the importance of scaling up digital health data insights for life insurers to effectively serve underserved markets and address the life insurance gap. By leveraging these insights, insurers can reduce mortality slippage. This announcement was made in Atlanta on Feb. 20, 2025.

news.headline: Miami Gardens Mayor Rodney Harris, NAREB President Courtney Johnson Rose, Rev. Arthur Jackson III to headline Black Wealth Tour event in Miami Gardens on Feb 22, 2025. Free workshops, youth activities, housing counselors, and one-on-one sessions available to help black families build intergenerational wealth.
news.summary: Important announcement for events on Saturday, February 22, 2025, from 10 AM to 3 PM in Miami Gardens, Fla. There will be free workshops, youth activities, housing counselors, and one-on-one sessions aimed at assisting black families in building intergenerational wealth. To register, visit the provided link.

news.headline: Toll Brothers to open luxury home community, Oakbend in Venice, FL in summer 2025. Wellen Park master plan.
news.summary: In Venice, Florida, on February 20, 2025, Toll Brothers, Inc. revealed the upcoming debut of their latest Sarasota-area community, Oakbend Wellen Park, situated within the Wellen Park master plan. The leading luxury home builder shared that this gated neighborhood will feature a range of expansive one- and two-story home designs created by Toll Brothers, along with a variety of upscale amenities. Currently, site preparations are in progress, and it is expected that the community will be available for purchase starting in the summer of 2025.
